Romantic Couple Photo – Google Gemini Viral Prompt

Shiv Sagar Mehra10 May 2026

⚡ Today's Viral Prompt

COPY READY
Cinematic portrait of a young Indian man/woman, soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look. Realistic skin texture with subtle pores, dark expressive eyes with natural catchlights. Wearing casual streetwear — oversized hoodie in muted tones, silver chain. Background: softly blurred urban street at golden hour, warm bokeh lights. Film grain overlay, slight teal-orange color grade. Ultra high detail, 4K cinematic quality. Hyperrealistic photography style.

📖 ChatGPT se Photo Kaise Banayein — by Shiv Sagar Mehra

1

ChatGPT Open Karo

ChatGPT.com ya Google Gemini open karo aur login karo. Free version mein bhi prompts kaam karte hain.

2

Photo Upload Karo

Chat mein paperclip icon click karke apni selfie upload karo jise edit karna hai.

3

Prompt Paste Karo

Shiv Sagar Mehra ke website se prompt copy karo aur ChatGPT mein paste karo.

4

Generate & Share Karo!

AI seconds mein amazing photo banayega! Download karo aur Instagram par viral karo! 🎉
